step_rationale: AMI diagnostic signature; ferroptosis-related marker indicating cardiomyocyte stress and ischemic injury.
mechanism: DUSP1 dysregulation in acute MI reflects cardiomyocyte ferroptosis and ischemic death signaling.

references.title: Identification and characterization of novel ferroptosis-related genes in acute myocardial infarction.
Identification of an 11 immune-related gene signature as the novel biomarker for acute myocardial infarction diagnosis.
